title: CF_DocCentralV3_CloseRegistryYear — Response Schema
description: Output returned to the Canvas App after the year closing attempt. Includes the specific precondition that failed so the Canvas App can display an actionable message.

message.const: Godina je uspešno zaključena. Nova delovodna knjiga je kreirana za narednu godinu.

failedPrecondition.description: Human-readable description of which precondition failed and why. Empty string if not a precondition failure.

errorCodes.YEAR_NOT_ACTIVE: Input yearToClose does not match the active year in App Config, or no active registry book exists.
errorCodes.YEAR_ALREADY_CLOSED: The active registry book is already marked as closed.
errorCodes.DOCUMENTS_NOT_ALL_ARCHIVED: One or more documents for this year are not in Stanje = Arhivirano.
errorCodes.RESERVED_NUMBERS_EXIST: One or more items exist in RezervisaniBrojevi for this year.
errorCodes.CONCURRENT_UPDATE: The App Config registry book item was modified concurrently (412 on PATCH). The Canvas App should refresh and recheck preconditions before retrying.
errorCodes.CLOSE_YEAR_FAILED: General failure during year closing operations, or new registry book creation failed after year was marked closed (admin must inspect App Config).

canvasAppGuidance.onSuccess: Show: 'Godina {closedYear} je uspešno zaključena. Sistem je spreman za godinu {newActiveYear}.' Refresh the active year display.
canvasAppGuidance.onYEAR_NOT_ACTIVE: Show: 'Odabrana godina ne odgovara aktivnoj godini u sistemu. Osvežite stranicu.' Do not allow retry without refreshing App Config data.
canvasAppGuidance.onYEAR_ALREADY_CLOSED: Show: 'Ova godina je već zaključena.' No user action required.
canvasAppGuidance.onDOCUMENTS_NOT_ALL_ARCHIVED: Show: 'Postoje dokumenti koji nisu arhivirani. Arhivirajte sve dokumente pre zaključenja.' Navigate user to archive screen.
canvasAppGuidance.onRESERVED_NUMBERS_EXIST: Show: 'Postoje rezervisani brojevi za ovu godinu. Razrešite rezervisane brojeve pre zaključenja.'
canvasAppGuidance.onCONCURRENT_UPDATE: Show: 'Zaključenje nije uspelo zbog istovremene izmene. Osvežite stranicu i pokušajte ponovo.'
canvasAppGuidance.onCLOSE_YEAR_FAILED: Show: 'Zaključenje nije uspelo. Kontaktirajte administratora.' Log correlationId for support.

examples.message: Godina je uspešno zaključena. Nova delovodna knjiga je kreirana za narednu godinu.

examples.failedPrecondition: Postoje rezervisani brojevi za ovu godinu.
